_README: Placeholder questions used by the collector UI. Replace with final Omli question text. The pipeline treats the first 4 as 'prompted' (open-ended spontaneous speech). The remaining 8 are structured tasks (sentence repetition, naming, counting). `expected_text` is what the child is supposed to say — used by speech_delay's word_coverage and naming_accuracy metrics. Null for prompted (open-ended).

questions.text: Tell me about your favourite toy. What does it look like? What do you do with it?
What did you do today? Tell me about the things you did.
If you could go anywhere in the world, where would you go and why?
Tell me about your family. Who is in your family and what do they do?
Repeat after me: "The cat is sleeping on the mat."
questions.expected_text: the cat is sleeping on the mat

questions.text: Repeat after me: "My birthday is in the summer."
questions.expected_text: my birthday is in the summer

questions.text: Repeat after me: "We went to the park yesterday."
questions.expected_text: we went to the park yesterday

questions.text: Repeat after me: "I have a red ball and a blue car."
questions.expected_text: i have a red ball and a blue car

questions.text: Say each word three times: "apple, apple, apple"
Say each word three times: "elephant, elephant, elephant"
Say each word three times: "butterfly, butterfly, butterfly"

questions.expected_text: one two three four five six seven eight nine ten
